checks.name: HUD_TEXT
checks.detail: chart text hf p90=11.97 (floor 3.2) — guards 'chart letters illegible'

checks.name: CAPTION_TEXT
checks.detail: caption text hf p90=7.64 (floor 3.2) — guards 'captions generic/hard to read'

checks.name: EVENT_CADENCE
checks.detail: biggest dead gap=0.0s (max 5.0s), dead windows=[] — guards 'boring/too slow'

checks.name: BEAT_DENSITY
checks.detail: 19 distinct visual beats (need >=12, ~1 per 5s) — the picture must keep telling the story, not just move

checks.name: SCENE_STRUCTURE
checks.detail: 5 shots, 4 real transitions, 5 framings — a genuine sequence of shots (config/shot_structure.yaml)

checks.name: READABILITY
checks.detail: 116 readable words checked, 0 too dim/low-contrast (need vis>=0.42, contrast>=2.0) — guards 'every word bright + legible'

checks.name: MUSIC
checks.detail: music source = sourced ("Reawakening" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com) - CC BY 4.0) — must be a freshly-sourced real track; synth/legacy fails (fix get_music + re-mix)

checks.name: SFX_EVENTS
checks.detail: 22 sound events, 19 verified audible — every shot sonified, events audible in the master (VISUAL_FLOW.md §5)

checks.name: SILENCE_DIP
checks.detail: bed at silence_at=35.4s sits 10.4 dB under its neighborhood (need >=6) — the breath before the payoff is real, not planned

checks.name: LIVING_SCREEN
checks.detail: 29/29 2s-windows show >=3 disjoint motion regions (100%, floor 80%) — layered choreography, not one ticker on a held frame (CHOREOGRAPHY.md)

checks.name: HOOK_WINDOW
checks.detail: first two 2s windows carry [6, 5] disjoint motion regions (each needs >=3) — a muted scroll decides at ~1.3s; the hook arrives loaded or not at all

checks.name: FIRST_FRAME
checks.detail: frame 0 edge energy 5.41 (floor 4.0 — poster-grade ink/headline present), luma std 53.1 (floor 30 — real contrast, no fade-from-black)

checks.name: DIMENSIONAL
checks.detail: engine=dimensional scale=1.0 shadow_fn=True arch=cpu — 3D hygiene clean

checks.name: DEPTH_FIELD
checks.detail: median near/far depth spread 8.7 world units over 301 samples (283 above floor) — a real 3D scene, not a flat card (need med>=2.0, 80% >=1.0)

checks.name: CAMERA_MOTION
checks.detail: camera path 22.28 wu, focus travel 5.10 wu, max step 5.8182 — the camera must LIVE (drift at minimum) and either travel or rack (>=0.4 wu)
